title: DISA Awards Leidos $11.5 Billion Defense Enclave Services Contract
text: RESTON, Va., Feb. 28, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Leidos (NYSE: LDOS), a FORTUNE® 500 science and technology leader, has been awarded the Defense Enclave Services (DES) contract by the Defense Information Systems Agency.

title: Leidos Appoints Former Acting Secretary of Defense Patrick Shanahan to Board of Directors
text: RESTON, Va., Feb. 16, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Leidos (NYSE: LDOS), a FORTUNE® 500 science and technology leader, today announced that Patrick Shanahan has been elected to the company's Board of Directors, effective February 16, 2022.

title: Leidos Holdings (LDOS) Q4 Earnings Miss, Revenues Rise Y/Y
text: Leidos Holdings' (LDOS) Q4 adjusted EPS declines 4.3% from $1.63 per share registered a year ago. Its total revenues miss the Zacks Consensus Estimate.

title: Leidos (LDOS) Misses Q4 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: Leidos (LDOS) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of -2.50% and 0.41%, respectively, for the quarter ended December 2021. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Leidos Holdings, Inc. Reports Fourth Quarter and Fiscal Year 2021 Results
text: RESTON, Va., Feb. 15, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Leidos Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: LDOS), a FORTUNE 500® technology, engineering, and science company, today reported financial results for the fourth quarter and fiscal year 2021.

title: Leidos Holdings (LDOS) to Post Q4 Earnings: What's in Store?
text: Leidos Holdings' (LDOS) Q4 results are expected to reflect solid organic and inorganic growth patterns while supply chain issues might hurt earnings

title: U.S. Army Selects Leidos to Update the Service's Gunnery Training Simulators
text: RESTON, Va., Feb. 8, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Leidos (NYSE: LDOS), a FORTUNE® 500 science and technology leader, today announced it has been awarded a prime contract by the U.S. Army's Program Executive Office for Simulation, Training, and Instrumentation to modernize the service's gunnery training simulation systems.

title: This Defense Contractor's for Sale. Here Are the Potential Buyers.

title: LEIDOS TO PARTICIPATE IN THE COWEN 43RD ANNUAL AEROSPACE/DEFENSE & INDUSTRIALS CONFERENCE
text: RESTON, Va., Feb. 2, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Leidos (NYSE: LDOS), a FORTUNE 500® science and technology company, will participate in the Cowen 43rd Annual Aerospace/Defense & Industrials Conference webcast.
